PRO - ACTIVE RISK SUMMARY
•Mobile Vulnerability: Mobile devices show a 51.25% fraud rate, significantly higher than desktop. Recommend multi-factor authentication (MFA) specifically for mobile logins. 
•High-Risk Geolocations: Identified 5 specific coordinates with 100% fraud rates. Recommend immediate blacklisting of these IP/Location signatures.
•Anomalous Spike: Significant transaction surge noted at 11:00 AM. Further investigation required to determine if this is a recurring bot-attack pattern.
